name: Cranberry Pear Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pecans, flour, sugar, and salt for the pastry.
2. Add butter and shortening to the dry ingredients. Work in the ice water until a dough forms.
3. Form the dough into two balls, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the pears with sugar, lemon peel, salt, cornstarch, and butter.
5. Pour the filling into the pie crusts.
6. Bake at 375°F until golden brown.
7. Serve warm or at room temperature.
